Tired of Burning Money on Ads? 🔥 

Stop Struggling with Google Ads

Whether you’re starting with free tools or ready to go pro, Ad Alchemy combines automation, AI, and the Growth Club community to help you run Google Ads like the top 1%.

No fluff. No jargon. Just real strategies, tested on $500M+ in campaigns.

Campaign Builder

Build campaigns faster with AI that finds winning keywords, groups them into laser-focused ad groups, and writes copy that converts.

Landing Page Optimisation

Level up landing pages with AI that spots technical fixes and rewrites copy using battle-tested data from top performers.

Spy on Your Competitors

Uncover competitor ads and keywords with AI-powered intel and industry benchmarks to outsmart their strategy.

Know Your Metrics

Map your funnel, tweak key metrics, and see exactly how small wins turn a money pit into a ROAS machine.

RATED 4.4 BY APPSUMO USERS
A letter from the founders...

Hey there,

We’re Jay, Jason, and Matt – PPC veterans who’ve spent $500M on ads, scaled 50+ brands, and been flown around the world by Google to trade secrets with their top minds.

We’ve had the wins (billions in leads, Google awards) and the gut-punch losses (burned budgets, sleepless nights, campaigns that tanked). That pain is why we built the TALL Framework and Ad Alchemy – tools that turn PPC from guesswork into a growth engine.

And we don’t just hand you the tools. Inside the Ad Alchemy Growth Club, we share our latest strategies, quick wins, and news so you stay ahead of the curve.

If you’re done wasting money on mediocre ads, it’s time to join us.

Let’s turn your PPC into profit.


Jay, Jase and Matt

Founders of Ad Alchemy

Relax. The PPC pain is over. 🥳 

How Ad Alchemy Solves Your Biggest PPC Headaches

We've spent over $25,000,000 on Google Ads to generate over $100,000,000 in leads. We built Ad Alchemy to create predictably profitable, best-practice campaigns for ourselves.

Now you can use it too.

Increase CTR & Traffic

Boost your click-through rate and drive more qualified traffic to your site:


AI-Powered Campaign Structures: Use AI automation to build campaigns optimized for maximum click potential.

Better Keyword Targeting: Identify high-performing keywords that attract your ideal customers with AI.

Persuasive Ad Copy: Write compelling ads with our AI-powered ad writing and recommendation tools.

Reduce Wasted Spend

Stop throwing money away on ads that don't get clicks and clicks that don't convert:

Eliminate Junk Keywords: Use our AI-powered filtering to focus on the most profitable keywords.

Improve Ad Relevance: Write better ads that align with your keywords and landing pages for a higher QS.

Optimize Campaign Structure: Build highly relevant campaigns that improve conversion rates.

Lift Conversion Rates

Turn clicks into paying customers and maximize your return on investment:

Compelling Ad Copy: Write ads that resonate with your target audience and drive action.

Landing Page Analysis: Identify what you need to do to improve your landing pages to convert better.

Dynamic Keyword Insertion (DKI): Personalize your landing pages for each search term, increasing relevance and engagement.

Scale Up Volumes

Turn unprofitable campaigns into profit-generating machines:


Research Tools: Uncover untapped keywords and markets with our powerful research tools.

Faster Campaign Building: Automate best practice campaign creation to save time and resources.

Profit Optimization: Use LTV Funnel Maps to identify and maximize your most profitable customer segments.

Make More Profits

Apply the TALL Framework to unlock the full potential of your campaigns:

Strategic Approach: Move beyond tactics and implement a comprehensive strategy for long-term success.

Maximize Relevance: Align your keywords, ads, and landing pages for maximum impact.

Increase Lifetime Value: Use our Funnel Maps to optimize your customer journey and boost profits.

Simplify Your Strategy & Save Time

Stop struggling with complex PPC strategies and get back to growing your business:

Proven Framework: Follow our simple yet effective TALL Framework for predictable results.

Expert Community: Get support and insights from our Growth Club and dedicated PPC experts.

Streamlined Tools: Automate repetitive tasks and simplify your workflow with our AI-powered software.
